name: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy homemade pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl
In another bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, and vanilla
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and mix until just combined
Heat a pan over medium heat and add butter
Pour 1/4 cup batter for each pancake
Cook until bubbles form on surface, then flip
Cook until golden brown on both sides

name: Caesar Salad
description: Classic Caesar salad with crispy romaine and homemade dressing
instructions: In a bowl, mash garlic and anchovies into a paste
Add egg yolk, lemon juice, and mustard
Slowly whisk in olive oil until emulsified

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Authentic Italian pasta with eggs, cheese, and pancetta
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions
Dice and cook pancetta until crispy
Mix egg yolks with grated parmesan
Reserve pasta water, then drain pasta
Remove from heat, add egg mixture
Toss quickly, adding pasta water to create sauce

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Mix flour, baking soda, and salt

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple and healthy avocado toast with extras

name: Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and healthy chicken and vegetable stir fry
instructions: Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch
Heat oil in wok over high heat
